title: astrocaryum murumuru var. urostachys
intro: Astrocaryum murumuru var. urostachys, commonly known as the murumuru palm, is a plant species within the Arecaceae family native to the Amazon rainforest. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its seeds and oil. The health benefits of Astrocaryum murumuru var. urostachys include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in natural skincare products and traditional medicine. Herbal preparations often involve extracting the oil from the seeds, which can be used in topical applications, hair care products, and as a dietary supplement.
